schemes.name: PM-KISAN (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi)
application_process: Fill Aadhaar number and other details
common_rejections: Aadhaar not linked to bank account

schemes.name: Ayushman Bharat - Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PM-JAY)
schemes.description: Health insurance for economically vulnerable families
schemes.benefit: ₹5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary hospitalization
eligibility: Economically vulnerable based on deprivation criteria
application_process: Visit nearest Ayushman Mitra or empanelled hospital

schemes.name: MGNREGA (Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act)
schemes.description: Guaranteed 100 days of wage employment in rural areas
schemes.benefit: Minimum wage for 100 days of unskilled manual work per household per year
eligibility: Willing to do unskilled manual work
application_process: Apply for job card with household details
Work will be provided within 15 days

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana (PMUY)
schemes.description: Free LPG connection to women from BPL households
schemes.benefit: Free LPG connection with deposit-free cylinder and regulator
eligibility: Not already having LPG connection in household
application_process: Connection will be provided within 7-10 days
common_rejections: Already have LPG connection in family

schemes.name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana (SSY)
schemes.description: Savings scheme for girl child with high interest rate
schemes.benefit: High interest rate (currently ~8%), tax benefits, maturity at 21 years
eligibility: Girl child below 10 years of age
application_process: Visit post office or authorized bank
Minimum deposit ₹250, maximum ₹1.5 lakh per year
Can deposit till girl turns 15 years

schemes.name: Post Matric Scholarship for SC Students
schemes.description: Financial assistance to SC students for post-matriculation studies
schemes.benefit: Maintenance allowance, tuition fees, and other compulsory fees
eligibility: Student belongs to Scheduled Caste (SC) category
Studying in Class 11, 12, or higher education (graduation, post-graduation, diploma, etc.)
Family income less than ₹2.5 lakh per annum
documents: Income certificate (family income less than ₹2.5 lakh)
application_process: Click on 'New Registration' if first time
Fill registration form with personal details
Select 'Post Matric Scholarship for SC Students'
Fill application form with academic and family details
Note down application ID for tracking
Scholarship amount will be credited to bank account after approval
common_rejections: Income certificate shows income above ₹2.5 lakh
Caste certificate not valid or expired
Documents not properly uploaded or unclear
Bank account not in student's name
Aadhaar not linked to bank account
important_notes: Apply online only through National Scholarship Portal
Ensure all documents are clear and readable
Scholarship is renewed every year - must reapply
Different states may have additional requirements

schemes.name: MGNREGA (Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act)
schemes.description: Employment guarantee scheme for rural households
schemes.benefit: Guaranteed 100 days of wage employment per year to rural households
eligibility: Willing to do unskilled manual work
Indian citizen residing in rural area
application_process: Visit your local Gram Panchayat office
Submit written application for job card
Get job card issued within 15 days
Work will be provided within 15 days of application
Wages paid directly to bank account
important_notes: Unemployment allowance if work not provided within 15 days
Wages must be paid within 15 days of work completion
Work provided within 5 km radius of residence
Equal wages for men and women
Can apply for work multiple times in a year

schemes.name: PMKVY (Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana)
schemes.benefit: Free skill training and certification with monetary rewards (₹8,000 average)
eligibility: Basic literacy preferred but not mandatory
application_process: Select your location and preferred skill

schemes.name: Startup India
schemes.description: Government initiative to promote entrepreneurship and startups
schemes.benefit: Tax exemptions for 3 years, easier compliance, funding support, IPR fast-tracking
eligibility: Entity incorporated as Private Limited Company or LLP
Turnover less than ₹100 crore in any financial year
Working towards innovation/development of new products
Entity not formed by splitting up existing business
Not older than 10 years from date of incorporation
application_process: Fill startup details and upload documents
Apply for tax benefits through DPIIT
Access funding schemes and incubation support
important_notes: Self-certification for labor and environment laws

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri MUDRA Yojana (PMMY)
schemes.description: Loans for micro and small businesses
schemes.benefit: Collateral-free loans up to ₹10 lakh for business
eligibility: Manufacturing, trading, or service sector business
application_process: Choose loan category: Shishu (up to ₹50k), Kishore (₹50k-₹5L), Tarun (₹5L-₹10L)
important_notes: Available at all public and private banks

schemes.name: Stand-Up India Scheme
schemes.description: Loans for SC/ST and women entrepreneurs
schemes.benefit: Bank loans between ₹10 lakh to ₹1 crore for greenfield enterprises
eligibility: Loan for greenfield enterprise (manufacturing, services, trading)
At least one SC/ST or woman entrepreneur per bank branch
application_process: Attend skill development program if needed

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY)
schemes.description: Financial inclusion program for zero-balance bank accounts
schemes.benefit: Free bank account, RuPay debit card, ₹10,000 overdraft facility, ₹2 lakh accident insurance
documents: OR any officially valid document (Voter ID, Driving License, PAN, Passport)
application_process: Submit Aadhaar or other ID proof

schemes.name: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
schemes.description: Pension scheme for unorganized sector workers
schemes.benefit: Guaranteed pension of ₹1,000 to ₹5,000 per month after 60 years
eligibility: Not covered under any statutory social security scheme
important_notes: Monthly contribution: ₹42 to ₹1,454 (based on age and pension choice)
Spouse gets pension after subscriber's death
Nominee gets corpus if both die
Can increase/decrease pension amount once a year
